criteria_checked.note: PROCESS NOTE: this verdict binds the bytes actually on disk at review time, sha256 45c35fe9... — NOT the 5cd874ce... hash the requesting message stated; the file changed again after that message (it additionally folds in the R2-message residual advisories: the '(armed run)' qualifier and the NEEDS_CLARIFICATION arming disposition). Consumers must reconcile the hash chain against 45c35fe9...; `dmc validate plan` VALID (exit 0) on these bytes at repo HEAD 2999870.
ENTIRE pre-M6 .claude/hooks/ tree incl. lib/** and worker guards + settings.json, pinned to the recorded pre-M6 HEAD commit, whole-tree cmp (lines 68, 100-107, 217-220, 245-248).

SHIM RUNTIME CONTRACT (142-158) pins the six baseline assertions as REQUIRED matrix rows with script-relative Ring-0 resolution + inline L0 floor; baseline UNMODIFIED (211-213), masking forbidden (94-95), high-severity risk row (231), committed-replica pattern (177-180, 215).

Item (v) (120-124): run-arming refuses a plan-bound REJECT (floor, never opens a gate, C11 intact); NEEDS_CLARIFICATION explicitly does NOT refuse arming (123-124); negative-control fixture; acceptance criterion + R12/C11 re-test (205-207); scoped dmc-run-lifecycle.py row (79); suite row (276).
Tasks DMC-T011.1-.4; remaining DMC-T011b strings (16, 267) are references to the master's M6.5 ID in the resolution notes.

blocked.json sidecar (125-128) with dmc-CLI-only write/resolve and stop-gate consumption; STATES/run.json untouched (79, 91-92, 128); schemas row (80); run-core risk row (232); selftest run-core required (279).
ARMING SEMANTICS L0/L1 (129-135); unarmed criterion with positive+negative fixture pair (201-204); unarmed matrix rows (169-170).
Suites Change (174-177), acceptance criterion (208-210), required Verification Commands row (278).
O1 per-hook per-mode floor rows (150-152, 168, 196-199); O2 committed-replica note (177-180, 215); O3 fixture-byte pinning (68, 220); O4 dmc-router.sh not-edit row + Out of Scope (74, 91).

O5: Edit/Write internal-allow REPLACED by the NARROW exemption, blanket .harness/runs + .harness/decisions auto-allow at scope-guard.sh:73-78 removed, run-state files via dmc CLI only (153-157) — verified as a tightening: no runtime writer of .harness/decisions exists outside legacy verify scripts, so no over-block; a run needing decision writes scopes them in its plan. O6: untracked-noise rows — post-Bash guard snapshots the worktree at ARMING time, pre-existing untracked noise never trips BLOCKED, selftest-under-armed-run stays green via mktemp-only writes (170-173). O7: secret-guard shim path-only, NEVER opens or reads file contents (157-158).

'(armed run)' qualifier added to acceptance criterion 1 (187); NEEDS_CLARIFICATION arming disposition stated (123-124). Remaining cosmetic-only: the Rev 2 header summary (8-21) does not list the O5-O7 closures — normative sections contain them; header text is non-binding.
